Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena Seeking Production Of Business Records From Michele A. Mclaughlin, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LISA BATTISTA, ESQ. of Gwire Law Offices, Tel No. 415-296-8880 appearing for Plaintiffs;
Atty. TYRA R. SAECHAO, ESQ. of Kaufman Borgeest & Ryan LLP, Tel No. 818-880-0992 appearing for Defendants Camico Insurance Services, Inc. and Liberty Insurance Underwriters, Inc.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court takes PLAINTIFFS DANIEL GOODMAN, AND DANIEL F. GOODMAN, MD, A MEDICAL CORPORATION'S Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena Seeking Production Of Business Records From Michele A. Mclaughlin, And Request For Sanctions under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
